{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":1169},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7434877455456731928","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"最豪康的洪荒文，不接受反驳，作者文笔又亲民又不忘记玩梗，而且还有逻辑性，感情也很到位，满昏！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731082742,"group_id":"7427895128531946521","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"洪荒有十，娲皇、圣母、母亲，各占有三，遁去其一曰：神话女娲","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/QS4Bn0whC1lnPDNZ3HRQpDYM953/LwepF7uFwXhUBR","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bccfdcde1d514cb1bfd135fb77af7de4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710033&x-signature=5BNu8MWCZ1xholqKwffNC2TXRdo%3D","user_id":"3773950019771863","user_name":"失梦之人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3773950019771863","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427895128531946521","book_info":{"abstract":"混沌之始，天地未开。
三千魔神都未曾出世之际。
洪渊便已穿越了这里，还成为了盘古同胞亲弟。
而他也成为了混沌之中唯一活下来的存在。
面对大兄所化的洪荒。
洪渊自然是秉承着兄终弟及的优良品德。
懂不懂洪荒的洪字是怎么来啊？！
从今日起，洪荒我保了！
谁想动洪荒，我就弄谁！
三清：“叔，我想成圣！”

:{"expire_time":1775657062,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427895128531946521","book_info":{"abstract":"混沌之始，天地未开。
三千魔神都未曾出世之际。
洪渊便已穿越了这里，还成为了盘古同胞亲弟。
而他也成为了混沌之中唯一活下来的存在。
面对大兄所化的洪荒。
洪渊自然是秉承着兄终弟及的优良品德。
懂不懂洪荒的洪字是怎么来啊？！
从今日起，洪荒我保了！
谁想动洪荒，我就弄谁！

":4467},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7615840378994885401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看了那么多部的洪荒小说的。这一部小说更是升华了一下。前面有过一部红盘小说。主要是写穿越者穿越到洪荒，接着说的是盘古因为想要更上一层，所以在时间长河里面不断的找穿越者穿越过来引导洪荒，让天地人三道相对应的对象以身合道，并且关于盘古的那些血脉不能死的太多，最终因为正确的道路盘古活了也升级了。
现在这部小说是关于，作为盘古的弟弟，引导洪荒的发展，发现其他宇宙，最终发现盘古的弟弟原来是至高无上的存在的结果，也真的挺好看的。
都挺好看的，还是挺喜欢的，写的小说，主角对象也挺吸引人的，也不知道最后主角洪渊在未来的时间里面会干嘛，希望有个番外会更好点。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773211187,"group_id":"7427895128531946521","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzNsrr6Yt7t+bqp1Z4BY1owl9k8IFrbK/N6RUkvYbJB2","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e003ca5bf8b9454cad349ed376caee48~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709983&x-signature=QRHWejVL9M%2FhIDMXogsWMJhJZKw%3D","user_id":"2458988748494664","user_name":"一颗泽丽籽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2458988748494664","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7427895128531946521","book_info":{"abstract":"混沌之始，天地未开。
三千魔神都未曾出世之际。
洪渊便已穿越了这里，还成为了盘古同胞亲弟。
而他也成为了混沌之中唯一活下来的存在。
面对大兄所化的洪荒。
洪渊自然是秉承着兄终弟及的优良品德。
懂不懂洪荒的洪字是怎么来啊？！
从今日起，洪荒我保了！
谁想动洪荒，我就弄谁！
